
```{r libraries, echo=FALSE}
library(BiocManager)
library(biomaRt)
library(edgeR)
library(limma)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
```

```{r paths, echo=FALSE}
PROJECT_ROOT <- getwd()
OUTPUT_DIR <- file.path(PROJECT_ROOT, "figures", "Data Analysis")
dir.create(OUTPUT_DIR, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

```{r aap genlist, echo=FALSE}
options(scipen = 999)
options(timeout = 300)
#library(writexl)

#get gene informations for AAP-related genes
ensembl = useEnsembl(biomart="ensembl", dataset="hsapiens_gene_ensembl")
aap <- read.delim("AAP_genlist.txt", header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
aap_ensmbls <- getBM(
  attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "uniprotswissprot"),
  filters = "uniprotswissprot",
  values = aap$UniProt.ID,
  mart = ensembl
)

#aap_excel <- aap %>%left_join(aap_ensmbls,by = c("UniProt.ID" = "uniprotswissprot")) %>%rename(aap_ensembls = ensembl_gene_id)
#write_xlsx(aap_excel,path = "AAP_genlist.xlsx")
colnames(aap_ensmbls)[1] <- "ENSEMBL"
```

```{r limma, echo=FALSE}
#DGE analysis with limma

colData <- read.csv(file.path(PROJECT_ROOT, "datasets", "pseudobulk", "coldata_CD14-positive monocyte.csv"))
colData <- colData %>% filter(n_cells >= 20 & smoking_status == 0 & n_cells <= 1000)
colData$age <- as.numeric(substr(colData$age, 1, 2))

#---------------------------------------statistics--------------------------------------------
#used for population table after filtering
colData %>% group_by(ethnicity) %>% summarise(median_value = median(age, na.rm = TRUE))
median(colData$age)
colData %>% group_by(ethnicity) %>% summarise(min = min(age, na.rm = TRUE))
colData %>% group_by(ethnicity) %>% summarise(max = max(age, na.rm = TRUE))
colData %>% group_by(ethnicity) %>% summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")
n_females <- colData %>% group_by(ethnicity) %>% summarise(females = sum(sex == "female"), .groups = "drop")
sum(n_females$females)
sum(n_females$females)/length(colData$sex)
colData %>% group_by(ethnicity) %>% summarise(females = round(sum(sex == "female")/n(), digits=3)*100, .groups = "drop")
#---------------------------------------------------------------------------------

counts <- read.csv(file.path(PROJECT_ROOT, "datasets", "pseudobulk", "CD14-positive monocyte.csv"))
rownames(counts) <- counts[,1]
counts <- counts[,-1]
counts <- counts[,colData$donor_id]

group <- as.factor(colData$sex)
age <- as.numeric(substr(colData$age, 1, 2))
batch <- colData$batch
ethnicity <- as.factor(colData$ethnicity)
country <- as.factor(colData$country)
dge <- DGEList(counts = counts, group = group)
colData <- colData %>% mutate(batch = sprintf("batch_%02d", as.integer(factor(batch))))
design <- model.matrix(~ group + age + colData$country)

#age bins
bins <- c(17, 39, 64, Inf)
labels_age <- c("young adults", "middle age", "older adults")
colData$age <- cut(colData$age, breaks = bins, labels = labels_age,right = TRUE, nclude.lowest = TRUE)

#saves metadata required for the supervised classification models  
write.csv(colData, file.path(PROJECT_ROOT, "datasets", "colData.csv"))

#get gene informations for all genes
genes <- getBM(
  attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "hgnc_symbol", "chromosome_name", "start_position", "end_position"),
  filters = "ensembl_gene_id",
  values = rownames(counts),
  mart = ensembl
)
colnames(genes)[1] <- "ENSEMBL"
colnames(genes)[2] <- "Symbols"
#doppelte Einträge entfernen
genes <- genes %>% group_by(ENSEMBL) %>% slice(1)

# cutoff
cpm_cutoff <- 0.5
prop_samples <- 0.1
min_samples <- ncol(counts) * prop_samples

#Keep genes with CPM > 0.5 in at least 20% of samples
keep <- rowSums(cpm(dge, log = FALSE, normalized.lib.sizes = TRUE) > cpm_cutoff) >= min_samples
#keep <- filterByExpr(dge, design, min.count = 5, min.prop = 0.5)

dge <- dge[keep, , keep.lib.sizes=FALSE]

#supervised learning classification models dont use tmm normlization to prevent data leakage in cross-validation
dge_spl <- dge

# Normalisieren (TMM)
dge <- calcNormFactors(dge)

v <- voom(dge, design, plot = "False")
v_spl <- voom(dge_spl, design, plot = "False")
lcpm <- v_spl$E

fit <- lmFit(v, design)
fit <- eBayes(fit)
dt <- decideTests(fit)

#results
res <- topTable(fit, coef = 2, number = Inf)
res_age <- topTable(fit, coef = 3, number = Inf)
res$ENSEMBL <- rownames(res)
res_age$ENSEMBL <- rownames(res_age)
join <- dplyr::inner_join(aap_ensmbls, res, by="ENSEMBL")
join_age <- dplyr::inner_join(aap_ensmbls, res_age, by="ENSEMBL")
symbols_aap <- (genes %>% filter(ENSEMBL %in% join$ENSEMBL))[,c(1,2)]
symbols_aap <- (genes %>% filter(ENSEMBL %in% join_age$ENSEMBL))[,c(1,2)]
join <- dplyr::inner_join(join, symbols_aap, by="ENSEMBL")
join <- join %>% dplyr::select(Symbols, everything())
join <- merge(join, genes[c("ENSEMBL", "chromosome_name")], by = 'ENSEMBL')
join <- join %>% arrange(adj.P.Val)

aap_counts <- counts[join$ENSEMBL, ]
#write.csv(aap_counts, file="aap_counts.csv")

join_age <- dplyr::inner_join(join_age, symbols_aap, by="ENSEMBL")
join_age <- join_age %>% dplyr::select(Symbols, everything())
join_age <- join_age %>% arrange(adj.P.Val)

ptgs2_idx_female <- which(colData$sex == "female")
ptgs2_idx_male <- which(colData$sex == "male")

ptgs2_female <- lcpm['ENSG00000073756', ptgs2_idx_female]
ptgs2_male <- lcpm['ENSG00000073756', ptgs2_idx_male]


mean(ptgs2_female)
mean(ptgs2_male)

exp_mat_unscaled <- data.frame(lcpm[join$ENSEMBL,])
tmp_symbols <- (genes %>% filter(ENSEMBL %in% rownames(exp_mat_unscaled)))[,c(1,2)]
tmp_symbols <- tmp_symbols[order(match(tmp_symbols$ENSEMBL, rownames(exp_mat_unscaled))), ]
rownames(exp_mat_unscaled) <- tmp_symbols$Symbols

write.csv(exp_mat_unscaled, file= file.path(PROJECT_ROOT, "datasets", "exp_mat_unscaled.csv"))

#volcano plot
join$Significance <- rep("Not Sig", length(join$ENSEMBL))
down <- join$logFC < 0 & join$adj.P.Val <= 0.1
up <- join$logFC >= 0 & join$adj.P.Val <= 0.1
join$Significance[down] <- "Down"
join$Significance[up] <- "Up"
join$label <- ifelse(-log10(join$adj.P.Val) >= 0.8, join$Symbols, "")
join$Highlight <- ifelse(join$ENSEMBL == "ENSG00000073756", "Highlighted", "Normal")

volcano <- ggplot(
  join,
  aes(x = logFC, y = -log10(adj.P.Val), color = Significance, text = Symbols)
) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 3) +
  geom_point(
    data = subset(join, Highlight == "Highlighted"),
    aes(x = logFC, y = -log10(adj.P.Val)),
    color = "red", size = 4, shape = 21, stroke = 1.2
  ) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = subset(join, Highlight == "Highlighted"),
    aes(label = ifelse(label != "", Symbols, "")),
    color = "red", size = 10, max.overlaps = 50, show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = subset(join, Highlight != "Highlighted"),
    aes(label = ifelse(label != "", Symbols, "")),
    size = 10, max.overlaps = 50, show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("Not Sig" = "gray", "Down" = "#377eb8", "Up" = "#ff7f00")
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.1), linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.25, 0.25), linetype = "dotted") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-0.5, 0.5)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-0.5, 0.5, by = 0.25)) +
  annotate(
    "text", x = -0.35, y = 0.3,
    label = "Upregulated\nin females", size = 10
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text", x = 0.35, y = 0.3,
    label = "Upregulated\nin males", size = 10
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "log2 fold change",
    y = expression(-log[10]("adjusted p-value")),
    color = "Significance"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 24),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 24),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 24),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 24),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 24),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 24)
  )
ggsave(file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, "limma_volcano.png"), volcano, width=16, height=8, dpi = 300)
print(volcano)

join
```
